# TriangleAlert

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::TriangleAlert;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        TriangleAlert { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
warning, alert, danger, exclamation mark, linter

## Categories
notifications, shapes, development

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/triangle-alert)
